analysis.markdown:
This table presents classification performance metrics for two classes: Alzheimer and Healthy. The columns include Precision, Recall, F1-score, and Support.

| Class | Precision | Recall | F1-score | Support |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Alzheimer | 0.76 | 0.81 | 0.79 | 1,876 |
| Healthy | 0.76 | 0.71 | 0.73 | 1,597 |
